memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< ED25519Provider > ed25519_provider, std::shared_ptr< SR25519Provider > sr25519_provider, std::shared_ptr< Secp256k1Provider > secp256k1_provider, std::shared_ptr< Bip39Provider > bip39_provider, std::shared_ptr< CSPRNG > random_generator)
memberdef.name: CryptoStoreImpl

simplesect.para: success if exists or managed to create, failure otherwise

briefdescription.para: generates ED25519 keypair and stores it in memory
generates SR25519 keypair and stores it in memory
generates ED25519 keypair and stores it in memory
generates SR25519 keypair and stores it in memory
generates ED25519 keypair and stores it on disk
generates SR25519 keypair and stores it on disk
searches for ED25519 keys of specified type

parameterdescription.para: key type identifier to look for

briefdescription.para: searches for SR25519 keys of specified typeED

parameterdescription.para: key type identifier to look for

node.label: std::map< KeyTypeId, std::map< sgns::base::Blob< constants::ed25519::PUBKEY_SIZE >, sgns::base::Blob< constants::ed25519::PRIVKEY_SIZE > > >

childnode.edgelabel: < KeyTypeId, std::map< sgns::base::Blob< constants::ed25519::PUBKEY_SIZE >, sgns::base::Blob< constants::ed25519::PRIVKEY_SIZE > > >

node.label: std::map< KeyTypeId, std::map< sgns::base::Blob< constants::sr25519::PUBLIC_SIZE >, sgns::base::Blob< constants::sr25519::SECRET_SIZE > > >
